textByHashes.7a260388708068c7c84999c26d55210a57cd5340: Greetings human. These Hydras are not to be harmed unless you have permission. To act otherwise would be a danger to the balance.
textByHashes.c5032b82aff2771660853aff8e73e1122d44eb35: Human! To attack these creatures would be a threat to the balance. Only those with permission may fight them!
